notes: You can use normal Nvidia driver now but must be 415.22 or newer (to fix missing character models + better performance) and Proton 16.6 or newer is best
title: Outcast - Second Contact

notes: crashes immediately after execution showing a crash report hint
title: Outcast - Second Contact

notes: First cut scene gives a blank screen - Esc to skip.  In game menu mouse control gets lost sometimes , multiple  Alt-Tab can get it back.  quit game gives a screen freeze - then Alt-F4  to exit.
title: Outcast - Second Contact

notes: Proton still has mouse problems with O:SC that prevent the game from being played comfortably. Older Proton versions have more mouse problems as Proton has received mouse fixes. Now and then the game may freeze while starting but has not so far once in-game. Only the mouse problem is on concern being about 8-10 times in 3-4 hours that is every 20-30 minutes or so requiring alt tab, game save, and restart.
title: Outcast - Second Contact

notes: Mouse issues are fixed with Proton 4.11-4. This is the best and only good starting point for playing this game because of the mouse issues with previous versions of Proton. You may experience random freezes pre-start of the game - this is a Proton problem. Just wait for x minutes (up to about 11 minutes) until Proton finally gives up or try alt-tabbing and wait for force close. For most it should run perfectly without anything but I add only here to use wine d3d11 as for some gpu's like the one you see listed with this there will be about double performance that way which will allow better graphics. This is it. If you want to play this game on Linux, now its great.
title: Outcast - Second Contact
